metadata.title: Godel Unprovable Truths
metadata.artist: Nik Bear Brown, Tuzi Brown and Marley Brown

style.suffix: preschool educational illustration, felt-paper diorama, layered paper cutout style, soft pastel colors

beats.lyric_text: Wagwan / Consider dis sentence ya / Dis yah statement is false / So... it true
beats.scene: [STAR] waving hello beside a large paper speech-bubble card covered in wavy scribble lines, curious expression

beats.lyric_text: If a true, dat mean it false / But if a false, den it haffi be true
beats.scene: the speech-bubble card flipping in mid-air, one side sunny yellow and one side stormy blue, [STAR] watching wide-eyed

beats.lyric_text: Yuh see it / Just by talkin 'bout itself
beats.scene: the speech-bubble card curling around to point at itself, [STAR] tilting head, puzzled

beats.lyric_text: It mash up reason like it twis' back pon itself / A real paradox, bredda
beats.scene: a paper ribbon twisted into a Mobius loop, [STAR] tracing it with one flipper, dizzy spiral eyes

beats.lyric_text: So if it nah true, and it nah false / Wha it really be
beats.scene: [STAR] standing between a sunny yellow card and a stormy blue card, shrugging with both flippers raised

beats.lyric_text: Mi know it might sound like some fool-fool brain game / But round di early 1900s
beats.scene: an old-fashioned paper town with gas lamps and a horse carriage, sepia felt tones, quiet morning

beats.lyric_text: One man name Kurt Gödel / Tek it serious—an' change di whole maths game / Him discovery
beats.scene: [GODEL] stepping into the scene holding a tiny notebook, [STAR] looking up amazed

beats.lyric_text: It show seh math have limits, yuh zee it
beats.scene: [GODEL] drawing a soft chalk circle around a pile of number tiles, a few tiles left outside the circle

beats.lyric_text: A proof now, dat a just a solid argument
beats.scene: a paper scroll unrolling with neat rows of check marks, [STAR] nodding approvingly

beats.lyric_text: Fi show why one number statement haffi be true / But fi build dem kinda argument
beats.scene: [STAR] stacking paper blocks into a sturdy staircase toward one glowing number tile

beats.lyric_text: Yuh start wid some base—called axioms / Dem a di rule dem
beats.scene: three big solid stone-textured felt blocks resting on the ground, [GODEL] patting the top one

beats.lyric_text: Dat nuh need no more proof / Dem jus' stand firm / Everything inna math
beats.scene: the three base blocks standing perfectly still while wind ruffles grass and clouds, [STAR] leaning on them

beats.lyric_text: From di likkle one-two-three / To di biggest theory dem / All start from axiom dem
beats.scene: a tall tower of paper blocks rising from three sturdy base blocks, small tiles at the bottom, grand shapes at the top

beats.lyric_text: So if a statement bout numbers true / Yuh shoulda be able fi prove it
beats.scene: a path of stepping stones leading from the base blocks to a bright shining star, [STAR] hopping along it

beats.lyric_text: Using dem axioms / From Ancient Greece till now / Mathematician been using dat method
beats.scene: a paper Greek temple with columns, robed paper figures measuring shapes with string

beats.lyric_text: Fi prove or disprove everything / Clean and neat, no doubt
beats.scene: rows of tidy scrolls tucked in wooden pigeonholes, every scroll bearing a check mark, [GODEL] dusting them

beats.lyric_text: But when Gödel step inna di scene / Di math world did a wobble
beats.scene: the tall block tower swaying side to side, [STAR] pressing against it with both flippers, alarmed

beats.lyric_text: Paradoxes start show up / An people start fret / Big name mathematicians
beats.scene: small storm clouds popping up above worried paper mathematicians, loose papers swirling

beats.lyric_text: Did want fi prove seh math cyaan go wrong / But Gödel / Him never too sure
beats.scene: paper mathematicians hammering extra wooden supports onto the tower while [GODEL] stands apart thinking

beats.lyric_text: Matter of fact—him doubt if math / Even di right tool fi ask di big question / Words
beats.scene: [GODEL] holding a wooden ruler up to a soft cloud, the ruler bending, a puzzled frown

beats.lyric_text: Dem easy fi tangle up pon demself / But numbers / Dem usually straight—true or false
beats.scene: a ball of hopelessly tangled yarn beside a crisp straight number line, [STAR] pointing at each in turn

beats.lyric_text: Still... Gödel get one idea / Him turn equations into numbers—code dem
beats.scene: [GODEL] with a glowing lightbulb overhead, feeding paper equation cards into a small hand-crank machine

beats.lyric_text: So now, yuh can write one big statement / An represent it with just one number
beats.scene: the hand-crank machine stamping out one single giant golden number tile, [STAR] catching it

beats.lyric_text: Crazy, right / By doing dat, math start chat 'bout itself / Math get self-aware / And him write
beats.scene: a large felt-framed mirror with number tiles gazing at their own reflection, [STAR] peeking from the side

beats.lyric_text: Dis statement cyaan be proved / As one equation
beats.scene: [GODEL] solemnly holding up one golden tile marked with a tiny padlock symbol

beats.lyric_text: Now, dis different from di sentence we start wid / Cah math nuh play
beats.scene: the golden tile resting on a balance scale, sunny card in one pan and stormy card in the other, perfectly level

beats.lyric_text: It must be true or false / So which one it be
beats.scene: [STAR] scratching head between the two balance pans, a curl of paper shaped like a question mark overhead

beats.lyric_text: If it false—dat mean it can be proved / But if it can be proved—den it true
beats.scene: paper arrows chasing each other in a circle around the golden tile, [STAR] following them until dizzy

beats.lyric_text: But wait… if it true / An still cyaan prove it / Dat mean it true, but unprovable
beats.scene: the golden tile glowing warmly inside a glass case that has no door, [STAR] pressing a flipper to the glass

beats.lyric_text: Madness / But genius same way / Dis shake up di whole foundation / Math cyaan hold every truth
beats.scene: thin cracks spreading through the ground beneath the block tower, [GODEL] calm, [STAR] gasping

beats.lyric_text: Some truth always ago hide / Just outta reach / Even if yuh try patch di gap
beats.scene: a golden treasure chest resting on a very high cloud shelf, ladders far too short, [STAR] reaching up

beats.lyric_text: By adding more axioms / Guess wha / More unprovable truth ago pop up
beats.scene: [STAR] stacking extra blocks to climb higher while new golden chests appear on even higher clouds

beats.lyric_text: No matter how much yuh add / Unprovable truth still deh deh
beats.scene: an endless staircase of clouds, each step holding a distant golden chest, twilight felt sky

beats.lyric_text: It's Gödel pon top a Gödel / All di way down / It mash up plenty dreams
beats.scene: a spiral of ever-smaller owls, each holding a tinier golden tile, receding toward the center

beats.lyric_text: Of one perfect math world / Where every question get answer / Some mathematicians accept it
beats.scene: a snow globe holding a tidy perfect paper city, one thin crack running up the glass

beats.lyric_text: Some fight it / Some even try ignore di hole / Wha open up under dem / But truth
beats.scene: three paper mathematicians in a row: one shaking a fist, one shrugging peacefully, one laying a rug over a hole

beats.lyric_text: More and more problems / Start show demself unprovable / People start worry
beats.scene: golden chests popping up across the whole rolling landscape, worried paper faces at cottage windows

beats.lyric_text: If dem whole career based pon smoke / But still, Gödel's work / Never just close doors
beats.scene: wisps of felt smoke clearing to reveal [GODEL] opening a big bright paper door

beats.lyric_text: It open new one / Unprovable truths / Light di path fi early computers / An even today
beats.scene: a friendly room-sized paper-craft computer with spinning reels, its lights making a glowing path, [STAR] walking it

beats.lyric_text: Some genius still out deh / Try spot di truths / Yuh cyaan prove
beats.scene: small paper explorers with lanterns searching a starry felt meadow for golden chests

beats.lyric_text: So yeah, some certainty get lost / But thanks to Gödel / We find beauty inna di unknown
beats.scene: [STAR] and [GODEL] sitting together on a hill under a deep starry felt sky, one star brighter than the rest

beats.lyric_text: Right inna di heart / Of truth itself / Him build a code fi numbers talk 'bout numbers
beats.scene: a glowing heart-shaped constellation shining above the little hand-crank machine

beats.lyric_text: Fi math start reason wid itself / An' den... boom / Him write a ting weh seh
beats.scene: [GODEL] cranking the machine fast, sparkles bursting as the golden tile shoots upward like a firework

beats.lyric_text: This statement cyaan be proved / If it false—den it get proved
beats.scene: the golden padlock tile at night, paper arrows circling it once more under the stars

beats.lyric_text: But if it get proved—den it cyaan false / So it haffi be true / But still... unprovable
beats.scene: the golden tile settling gently onto a velvet cushion inside the doorless glass case, glowing softly

beats.lyric_text: Dat mash up di whole idea seh math can hold all truth
beats.scene: the snow-globe city cracking gently open, tiny paper stars drifting out

beats.lyric_text: Cause no matter how much yuh add / New truths always a hide outta reach / It deep
beats.scene: new tiny golden chests twinkling like stars beyond every hilltop, [STAR] gazing into the distance

beats.lyric_text: It paradox / It Gödel / All di way down
beats.scene: [STAR] and [GODEL] waving goodbye inside a warm spiral of owls and golden tiles, deep night felt sky
